name: Equinix, Inc.
description: Equinix, Inc. is a global digital infrastructure company that operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT). The company provides a vendor-neutral platform where a diverse ecosystem of more than 10,000 leading businesses, including cloud service providers, financial institutions, and enterprises, can interconnect and manage their mission-critical IT infrastructure. With a vast network of International Business Exchange (IBX) data centers across the Americas, Europe, Middle East, Africa, and Asia-Pacific, Equinix enables organizations to scale their digital operations, enhance performance, and accelerate their digital transformation through secure and reliable connectivity solutions.
